creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text: I see this on the Dell H330 as well, and the latest firmware from Dell for that adapter (25.3.0.0016,A02) was on the system at manufacturing in December.  This system also gives the annoying once-every-minute "mrsas0: 3515 (514512868s/0x0002/info) - Unexpected sense: Encl PD 20 Path 5241807048b40a00, CDB: 1c 01 02 80 00 00, Sense: 5/24/00" messages as well, which seem to be both well documented and a WONTFIX on Dell's part.
